case_title: SARA QUE NIA GOMES DOS SANTOS VS. VAHRAM MARTIROSYAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF SARA QUE NIA GOMES DOS SANTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAHRAM MARTIROSYAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMES DOS SANTOS, SARA QUE NIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIROSYAN, VAHRAM $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,300.00, DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE PLAINTIFF A REFUND OF HER $1100 SECURITY DEPOSIT WITHIN 21 DAYS. THERE IS EVIDENCE DEFENDANT ACTED MALICIOUSLY AND IN BAD FAITH. DEFENDANT SHALL ALSO PAY $50 TO THE COURT FOR COSTS PER GOV'T CODE 68637(B) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GOMES DOS SANTOS, SARA QUE NIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $80.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIROSYAN, VAHRAM
